name: Ralliant Corp
summary: Ralliant Corporation is a company that provides severance and change in control benefits to its officer-level employees. The filing excerpt is an amended and restated severance plan document outlining compensation and benefits for eligible employees upon termination under certain circumstances, including change in control events. No specific products or services are described in this section of the filing.
